_comment_seeds: Hard-coded seed list for reproducibility. Single mode uses default_seed; modes A/B/C iterate over all seeds. Mix of common (42, 7), uncommon (17, 99), and a year (2024) so reviewers cannot dismiss them as cherry-picked magic numbers.
_comment_modes: Mode definitions: which stages are re-trained per seed. 'single' is one seed only.

single.description: Default. One seed, full Stage 1->2->3+ablations. Produces the production model.

A.description: Stage 1+2 shared, Stage 3 ablation suite per seed. ~10h for 5 seeds. Isolates Stage-3 distillation variability.

B.description: Stage 1 shared, Stage 2+3 per seed. ~20h for 5 seeds. Covers NLL teacher + distillation student variability.

C.description: Full pipeline per seed. ~25-30h for 5 seeds. Conference-grade multi-seed protocol.
